statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next maintenance-planning slice: Garage saved maintenance notes are now actionable on iPhone.

Changed:
- `garage.html` / `garage.js`: added `Copy Latest`, per-note `Copy Note`, source planner links, `Open Full Note`, and live copy/status text for saved Service Prep and Minder notes.
- `styles.css`: added compact/mobile-safe action styling.
- `search-data.js`: updated Saved Maintenance Notes search metadata.
- `service-worker.js`: bumped cache to `ridgeline-console-v280`.
- `tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1`: added coverage for empty/populated note states, copy actions, planner routes, and mobile layout.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed.
- Targeted browser smoke passed for `garage.html` and `maintenance.html`.
- Full audit passed: `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v280-maintenance-note-actions -SkipScreenshots`.
- Captured screenshots:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v280-maintenance-note-actions-mobile-garage.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v280-maintenance-note-actions-desktop-garage.png`

No vehicle facts or Garage storage schema were changed. Next safe slice is real iPhone review of these copy/source actions before adding larger parts or inventory handoffs.
